review_text: Waited 30min for drinks.. party of 8 an Waitress said she couldn't give change for 100$  40 minutes  before food order was taken ... we altered one drink from having oj to soda water and it was wrong an then charge for a full soda water.. Manger knew there was a problem an never came to table.  Felt bad for waitress she seemed lost overwhelmed...Shrimp over cooked. No topping with burritos..Will not go back..
Terrible service, over-priced. Go to Mexican Fiesta in Hartland.
Ordered spinach burritos and didn't get any spinach and the time before that got the same thing will never go back!

Food is authentic and diverse.  Everything was delicious!  Chorizo cheese dip app is yummy and the street tacos,  Birria!!!
Had the grilled pineapple and berry margarita. Really good.
Also the Coco-Rita.   Yum!
Great staff! Very friendly😊
Huge portions of tasty food, too huge!  Great Margaritas.
Birra Tacos - excellent. Shrimp tacos - Excellent. Peach margaritas - excellent. The watermelon margaritas were good but wished they used fresh watermelon but still very good.

I have yet to have a bad experience or bad meal here
Food is always great, not greasy or overly salty
Just good authentic food

Worst Mexican restaurant around!
Been there once. Never go back!!!!!
Enjoyed are food
Sat at a table at the bar and no one came up to me for 20 min..even after I said hi to one of the waitress walking by she didn't say anything back to me!
Most authentic I’ve tasted in Michigan

I got the vegetarian quesodilla and I have to say, it was pretty bad. Tasted like white American kraft singles and mushrooms, extremely soggy outside and made me feel terrible after only a couple pieces. My friends food was also of very poor quality, again, with the white american cheese garbage, and it's not likely we will be back.
Beautiful spot, fantastic food! So many things on the menu to try, I will be back.

This was our second time here for dinner!  Food is delicious right from the start with warm chips and salsa.  I had the Burrito Maya tonight.  Last time I had a vegetarian selection of spinach and mushroom enchiladas!  The refried beans and cheese are creamy and delicious.  Everything was piping hot too!!   Delightful server !
Keep up the quality and we will be regulars!  😊
Great setting, quick service.

Amazing food, service, and drinks.
beautiful patio, lovely landscaping
*mic drop*
Went for lunch was very good

Food and atmosphere is really good, however, the drinks are ridiculously too expensive. I had two Coronaritas at $46.50.  There’s no reason for  drinks to be that expensive sorry. There are just as good Mexican restaurants to eat with way better priced drinks.

Food and drinks were great but service was awful. We were seated quickly but waited 2 hours for our food. Then didn’t have silverware and had to wait longer for silverware so we could actually eat. Had to go up to the front and ask other servers for our bill/ to cash us out. No drink prices on menu and found out when I got the bill we were charged $23 for a single margarita which is more than they charge for most meals on their menu. We’re not offered refills or boxes to go.

Regular marg is ok but extremely sugary.  Skinny marg is not drinkable- it's taste is awful and I didn't taste any tequila in it.
Steak fajitas have such a laughable amount of meat, like 2 ounces worth of chewy steak.
Taco biria are ok.
Service is hit or miss.  Too many bad experiences now, and seeing as the food quality doesn't make up for it, we are done.

Stopped in with a few friends for after dinner drinks. We kept seeing amazing looking food going to other tables and ended up all ordering some dishes. It was delicious. Service is very good, attentive and timely. We had some different tequilas, mezcal, margarita, chimichangas, flautas, and some other things. Was all very good. Thank you
Really great Mexican food and margs!
Steak fajitas, mostly green pepper, asked for extra shells, got 3.  Maybe 2-3 oz of steak.  No cheese, tons of lettuce, dab of sour cream.

The outdoor patio and space is great, but the service is terrible.  My wife and I have come here twice.  The first time we were never seated as our wait for a table kept getting longer, originally 30 minutes which after that time passed another 30 minutes, which turned into 60.

The second time we were seated, given tortilla chips and waters, and then our waiter never came back by even after multiple trips back out to the patio.  Can’t comment on the food, since we’ve never been able to order.

I was in El Paso, just across the border of Mexico.  Went to the best "authentic" Mexican restaurant in the city.  Casa Tequila is far better.  I never liked Chili Renello, until tonight.  Then add the "BEST" Margarita my wife ever had?  Found our new favorite place to dine.

First time here, had steak fajitas. The steak was not good quality and had a lot of fat and grizzle...my wife had a Chimichanga with ground beef and said the meat was flavorless.
Service was good and the atmosphere is nice, unfortunately the food was not
Great food, awesome service, and a fun atmosphere.

We ended up sitting at the bar because for whatever reason they were super busy on a Wednesday night. The bartender was very nice and he gave us excellent service. The exception to this was the top shelf margaritas we ordered. The flavor was not very good and we are pretty sure they had almost no alcohol in them. The kitchen was really slow and it took a very long time for the food to come out. When it did, there was almost no meat on the taco salad and it wasn't very good. The enchiladas were actually pretty good.
Excellent good, atmosphere and wait staff.   Definitely recommend
Very good, and more authentic Mexican food. I had the marisco(shrimp)burrito.

It was not our first time there and definitely not our last.
The food was fresh and the taste was very good. We had a very enjoyable evening and will come back soon.
Delicious food!!!

The pineapple in the back room was everything. Love the Dos Equis piñata.

The food was amazing. Large portions. Not sure why this place is only rated 4 stars.

The patio looks like it’d be killer but we are here early March. Looking forward to coming back this summer!!!
Everything was so good! Big portions and friendly staff.

We ordered our drinks and the server didn't bring my wife the proper drink.  Then we asked for just a moment to order, but she never returned.  Anderson saved the day by stopping by and when our original server came by we told her that he was now our server.  Once he took over the service was fantastic. Thank you Anderson for saving our meal.
Food was amazing! The birria tacos were fire! We also got the fajitas and they came out sizzling! We will be back!
Everything was great, delicious food and margaritas were spot on
Food was authentic and tasty!
Such nice people that work there and such good food!
Amazing food and service
Wonderful meal. Great service and friendly staff.

We had dinner last week it was my first time here. I had 3 tacos 1 chorizo 1 steak and 1 Chicken it was a combo thing. They were awesome didn't try much else but really enjoyed our visit. The service was awesome I will be back soon.

My husband walked in last night after a hard days work to grab a table for our family and 2 servers walked up to the host stand, spoke in Spanish to each other then walked away. He grabbed a menu and stood there for 10 minutes without anyone acknowledging him. We ended up meeting next door instead. If you don’t want business then don’t have a restaurant. SO rude.

Food was so delicious and our server made the experience wonderful and entertaining. Was a little busy but our large group was seated quickly. Loved that there was a hat to embarrass my father with while we sang happy birthday to him 😉. Fun night and experience. I had the flautas which were good and the green sauce was on point. A bit spicy but addicting

Admittedly I was unimpressed with Casa Tequila. The food was below average, with a salty tortilla soup and nachos that were mostly iceberg lettuce (it just didn't look very appetizing). The passion fruit margarita was AMAZING, but I don't think I'd come back for the food.
Excellent selection for Mexican. Authentic food and very good service, prices were comparatively reasonable compared to their local competition!
Horrible service. Watress never came back after serving food and drink. Steak fajitas could have had a little more steak. Margaritas were the best. Would have ordered another if I had a watress.

Find another place. This was a regretful meal. I ordered a chimichanga and got a burrito. The waitress basically said sorry. didnt take it back to correct, just sorry?  Then again service was so slow we rarely saw her. My husband ordered a meal where the steak was truly harder than shoe leather and unedible. The queso was akin to melted american cheese. We wont be back.

There is a great selection of items on the menu. We had a larger party for lunch, so I'll attribute that to the food not being hot, this time. Flavors were excellent, as was the presentation. Service was a little spotty as far as getting drink refills, but otherwise, good. I'll definitely give it a second try.

Friday evening in Brighton. The place looked packed, but they still seated us with no wait. There's enough choices other than your typical tacos and burritos so that I felt there was actually a choice at a Mexican restaurant!
Authentic Mexican. Great food reasonable prices.  Will definitely eat there again.
This place is the best! The food is SO good, the margs are strong and delicious (especially the frozen margs), and the workers are all so kind!
The sampler plate was terrible.  No beans, dry shredded chicken.  I would not recommend that to anyone.
Kevin was awesome! Great experience after driving all day, awesome margaritas, food and especially service! Patio is very pet friendly!
Paid $46 for TWO Drinks,  ridiculous to say the least. Way over priced.

The food is not fresh. I ordered a burrito and the whole thing was ice cold, including the cheese sauce on top. Sent it back and they literally put it in the microwave and told me it was re-made. The tell tale sign was the burrito had a bunch of lettuce in it, which also got the microwave treatment. We had the $12 cheese dip for an appetizer, which made my wife and I violently ill later that night. The staff doesn’t care about your food or your experience, except for one waiter who was very polite. I will never eat here again, and will be warning all my family, friends, and colleagues not to eat here as well. The ownership should be ashamed of the state of this restaurant.
Just had the best refried beens of my life! Iv never been a fan but these were the best. I would come back for just the beens!

Went to Casa Tequila for an anniversary dinner and it was a mediocre experience. They sat us in the booth that is literally 2 feet from the host station and the seats felt like they had a metal rod laying just underneath the cushion.

The food was not very flavorful but the portions were adequate. I had the sampler plater and I will admit the pepper stuffed with cheese is pretty bussin. Otherwise, nothing special to write home about. Pricing was on the high side, no doubt to cover their rent for this prime slice of real estate.
The Big Burrito was really good! Will be getting again!

The food was pretty good and staff were friendly. We had chips, tacos, enchiladas and fajitas. Some of the salsa chips had an off taste...maybe due to the oil they were fried in or mixing old chips with fresh. I couldn't really place it. The server took a while to get our drinks to us and they weren't busy. Other than that, the rest of our service was good. It was quiet since they weren't busy when during our visit. That all being said, I have been here in the past and have had excellent service and the chips were fine. I would still return again in the future.

Had lunch here with co workers today. Overall not a great experience. First red flag, no prices on the drink menu, second red flag, they do not have their gluten free menu on the website. If you have a gluten allergy you always want to check out their gluten free menu ahead of time. Third red flag, an employee laying on the sofa outside the ladies room. The burrito I ordered off the lunch menu was terrible! I literally spit it out. I don’t know if it was the sauce or some seasoning but it was awful. Also it came with refried black beans instead of pinto beans which was stated on the menu.The burrito also came with a slice of tomato. Everyone else had diced tomatoes. I asked for a chicken taco salad instead. It was completely devoid of any seasoning and my friend, the sliced tomato made a return on the taco salad. The 2 ladies that got the fajita taco salads enjoyed them. One of my lunch companions, who is gluten free, ordered the tostada and did not enjoy it. 2 people ordered large skinny margaritas and they were $23 a piece! I know 5 people who will not recommend or visit this establishment again. Oh and I was charged for the nasty burrito, not the taco salad

I had a terrible experience at Casa Tequila in Brighton and won’t be returning. The service was disorganized, and to make matters worse, I was overcharged on my bill. When I politely asked to see a receipt to understand the charges, the staff refused to provide one — which is not only shady but unacceptable.

There’s no reason a restaurant shouldn’t show you what you’re paying for. It felt like they were deliberately hiding something, and that’s a huge red flag. I left feeling ripped off and frustrated.

The food was average at best, certainly not worth the inflated price I ended up paying. There are plenty of other Mexican restaurants in the area that actually value their customers and operate with integrity. Avoid Casa Tequila unless you like surprise charges and zero transparency.

Amazing presentation and the taste was next level.  The atmosphere is a level of quality that many Mexican restaurants only wish they had.  I rated the service 4 star as our waitress seem a little preoccupied, but was friendly and helpful when she did come to the table.  Again you must come and experience their menu!!!
Waiter was terrible tired charging us for refills food was not good had to ask mutual times for a bill never actually seen the bill
Great food. Nice people
Super friendly staff, nice athmosphere, great food for a great price!
Very nice. Would recommend.

The food was ok, the ambiance was ok. The seats were very shallow, and hard to sit on without slumping or turning sideways. And they used an exceptionally strong smelling cleaner on the floors, while we were eating, right by the table.  The scent was reminiscent of the cleaner they put on vomit in grade school.
Cool place food and service terrible. Never filled drinks, 7$ for a side of guacamole. Also kept my change when i paid cash… better Mexican restaurants out there for sure!

A group of my friends and I went to Casa Tequila yesterday on Cinco De Mayo. It was very busy I will say, however it took an hour and a half for us to receive our food! That is honestly absurd, I understand the kitchen being busy but that was just insane. Also, the food was not worth the wait at all.
Not bad.  Your average Mexican American joint
Delicious food and drinks.  Highly recommend

The food was great, the drinks were great, the restaurant has a pretty cool atmosphere…but the service was terrible. It took forever to get my drink, for them to take our food order and they only checked on us once.
My new favorite go to for mexican and the margs are delicious!

Stopped in on a Wednesday afternoon for a late lunch. The salsa stopped me in my tracks, it was fantastic! Definitely the spicier side, but super flavorful. The cheese dip also had a good amount of flavor, not super spicy but mixed perfectly with the salsa.
The chicken enchiladas were very good as well, the sauce was not bland like a lot of places I’ve had.

Very clean restaurant including in the bathrooms! Wait staff was attentive and clean as well.
Good food, Service was decent.
My go-to place for a chimichanga, the tortilla chips are fresh and warm, there's a nice selection of hot sauces to choose from, the staff is always friendly and accommodating.

Mind blowing birthday
Omar the Boss
Omar was a great waiter!
Wonderful burritos.  There are plenty of other delicious selections as well.  Can't wait to go back!

What a gem! We stopped in for lunch and so glad we did. Very clean and charming decor. Staff super friendly. Food was delicious and loved the presentation of some of the dishes our table got. But what really did it for me was the salsa! I don’t know what voodoo they did to it but it’s like crack. So good I got an order to go. Definitely recommend this place!

Waited several years to check this place out and see that I wasn’t missing anything. Food wasn’t bad, but sat at the bar and over a 90 minute meal,  the bartender was behind the bar cumulatively for maybe 10 minutes. Most of that time doing service well. They all wear ear pieces but people all over the restaurant still need things, you can hear them asking. Told the bartender that I needed silverware when my food was served and she disappeared for almost 10 minutes and then even 2 servers came behind the bar to make drinks and wouldn’t acknowledge me or make eye contact, she then came to the service well and engaged in a five minute conversation and held her finger up to hold me off while I was trying to get silverware. Additionally, ordered French dressing with my salad, which is included, and she sent me French fries. When they came, I told her I didn’t order them and she left them and still charged me even though they were thrown away. Essentially, huge language barrier and super over-priced for the service and food, even though it’s DT Brighton. Won’t rush back, that’s for sure.
Daniela did a wonderful job and was so kind. Thank you
Phenomenal service.  Daniela was a delight. Fish tacos were amazing.
Daniella was a great server! Good place to grab a bite!
Great service from Daniela
Excellent meal with great service. Food came out quickly and was delicious
Daniela was an amazing server! Thank you!
Kevin was the best! He checked on us often to ensure our meal and meeting was going well!
Kevin was great! Love it here!!
Good food. Service was a bit slow, but got everything we asked for.

Always have an outstanding experience here. The food quality is awesome - best Mexican food in town! Daniela our server was very friendly and attentive, but unobtrusive also. Definitely recommend Casa Tequila!!

Some of the BEST Mexican food I’ve ever had!  The Queso Birria tacos 🌮 the best taco I’ve had anywhere!   If you are in Brighton Mi. You have to eat here!  And our server, Frida was fantastic as well!
Had an amazing experience at Casa Tequila- the quesa birria tacos were some of the best I’ve had, and great service from Frida!
Excellent service Katherine was super nice!
The food was good and our waiter Sebastian was so sweet definitely would come again.

Excellent service!
I loved it! 100% recommended!
:3
Frida was an incredible server! We had so much fun. She was so attentive, and inclusive. We would highly recommend this place. Not only Frida, but casa tequila is amazing as a whole!

We have been here 4 or 5 times. We like the food and the staff.. Tonight we had the pleasure of having Katherin as our server. She is a terrific waitress and a lovely young lady. Truly a great experience! Thank you Kate!
Frida was awesome, brought everything in a timely manner. Birria tacos are delicious, highly recommend.
Daniela was great!
Katherin our host was great, great service and food.

If you’re deciding on Mexican in Brighton, waste no more time and come to Casa Tequila. I’ve been here multiple times and each time is fantastic between the food, vibes and service there’s no better authentic Mexican in downtown. Thank you again Frida for a great visit 😄

Daniela did a great job.
We enjoy coming to this establishment every trip we make to Brighton.
Daniela was great!!
Katherine was amazing and the service was excellent I would definitely recommend this restaurant
Katherine was the best.!!!!! I loved the food was amazing top.
Frida, the best in the whole world.
We had such an amazing experience! Food and service is awesome!!!
Katherine was great to us at the bar. Friendly and attentive. Always smiling.
Fantastic food and drinks. Our waitress Frida was great! I highly recommend the tacos, skirt steak, or burrito. All the margaritas are fire, as well.
Daniela was our server and she was AMAZING!! We had a fantastic dinner, great atmosphere and superb service. My husband enjoyed speaking Spanish with her and we will definitely return!

German and Sebastian are top notch waiters. My family and I enjoy seeing them when we come in and they're always friendly to our son. Food is great and consistent, we haven't had a bad experience since coming to Casa Tequila. Highly recommend!

Sensation and German do a great job here. The food is always fast and delicious, and margaritas are phenomenal. They also have a wonderful house made sangria. Certainly the place to come for a good time or a family time.
Amazing experience. Tacos Locos gives you an awesome variety of what they offer and the chips were delicious on top of it all!
Great experience and delicious food.
Been coming to this place a few times and they never let me down. Affordable price for a good portion of food! Been recommending them to my out of town friends too and they love it here.
Love this place! Best food and way underrated! Service is amazing and family oriented
Good food and service and big servings for the price
Do not order the enchiladas. They are terrie. The beef is flavorless and relies too heavy on generic hot sauce for any flavor. Kids liked the chicken tenders and regular tacos though.

It's not easy to find a restaurant in the area with Vegan options, let alone an entire vegan and vegetarian menu. That being said, it's hands down the best Mexican food I've had since moving to Michigan! I would highly recommend it!

Didn’t even get the chance to eat here. Had a chance to meet the owner, impromptu he states that he owns a bunch of these because “he fills people up on rice and beans and charges a premium for it.” No thanks dude, what an awesome business model. This spot is for aging socialites and cat ladies. Avoid.
There better mexican places to go to

Pretty sure I’ve found my new favorite Mexican restaurant!!
It’s difficult to find grilled chicken options at Mexican restaurants (usually shredded!) but Casa Tequila has numerous dishes to choose from with grilled chicken!
Had the Burrito Maya with grilled chicken and chorizo!  It was wonderful! Chorizo was perfect! The queso sauce is amazingly good!!

Blanca and Santiago were gracious, smiling, friendly and helpful in selecting my food choice for the evening!
Blanca makes a fabulous Skinny Margarita!

Will definitely be back again and again to try more entrees from the menu!

If you haven’t been, GO!  You won’t be disappointed!

Thank you for the fabulous experience Blanca and Santiago!!!
Always delicious! Get the Birria Tacos or the Burrito Verde!
Wonderful place with great food! Staff was okay with service and always checked in periodically.
Went for Sunday lunch, really good food and friendly service, love the decor and atmosphere.
Four of us had different items for lunch, and everyone had great food. Very generous portions, everything was served hot. Waitress very friendly and efficient.  It's a good find.
No wait, great menu, very friendly service, good prices.  The music was a little too loud & made it hard to hear conversation though.

Came in for some Quesa birrias today. Awesome birrias! I've went to alot of locations and this one didn't disappoint. Server was Sebastian and he was quick and prompt. I enjoyed this place very much. However the tacos lacked flavor. Those were disappointing. Spice the food up a bit and I wouldn't have a single thing bad to say about this nice little establishment.

We went out as a family here tonight. We loved our experience. It seems family run and well done at that. You feel that they care. The food is delicious. Even our 13 month old devoured everything. Loved the service. All around 5 star family place that would also be fun for a date night.
Tortilla soup does not contain rice or potatoes let alone both.
We ordered nachos bravos as a carry out and there was no cheese! How do you not put cheese on nachos. Very disappointed.
Amazing, friendly, fast staff and abscond and fast food! Love casa Tequila, it's turned into my birthday dinner go-to!
Love love love this place
Nice and spicy food
Great food, great service. Great location.
Went for my fathers birthday turned around and there was a cock roach coming out of the wall

To be honest, hubby & I stayed away due to others poor reviews (BIG mistake). Decided to give it a try and WOW it was amazing! Had the birria tacos and they were the best we’ve ever had! Margaritas were too. Service was impeccable! Our new go to spot!
Very good food 👌
Fantastic and authentic flavorful Mexican cuisine. The setting is cozy and comfortable. The staff and server were friendly and helpful. I am definitely returning.

Food is mediocre, service not great.Our server Brought the wrong food to half the table, no apologies or anything. Finally bring the correct meals long after everyone was done eating, the correct meal was Ice cold and full of giant fat chunks (carnitas), so sent that back out of frustration…again no apologies or offers to make it right.     The food that we did eat was just so-so, not planning to return here.

We loved our dinner at this restaurant. So many other places in town were so loud it was like walking into a wall of sound, but at Casa Tequila there was a lively atmosphere but we could hear each other very well. The food was super, my girls said their margaritas were delicious, and we received fantastic service from Santiago.
Brighton is a good meeting point for our family, and we have already decided this restaurant will be our regular place to meet.
Excellent place to eat! My wife and I really loved it!
Awesome new restaurant for the area. Food was great and service was excellent. Great prices too.
Loved the environment and food! Had the Tamal and Enchilada, was amazing
The vegan tacos are so yummy!

Brightened our mood !! Came in disappointed from a previous restaurant that didn't even take our order. Our waitress here was so sweet and we got a nice spot! It wasn't crowded and the atmosphere was sweet and pretty. Music wasn't blaring either it looked sophisticated.

Drinks was served in a huge marg glass, so worth the money and actually wasn't all sweetener. Food was HUGE, we were pleasantly surprised at how quick and understanding the service was. She was also checking on us and she was a sweetheart. The food was delicious, I was happy people started coming in. Seems a little underrated !! I highly recommend going to Brighton. Found our fav spot.
Casa Tequila is a decent Mexican style restaurant. I wasn't blown away by anything, but if you're wanting Mexican food, it's a good choice.

Food was delicious service was horrible.  Had to find someone to provide menus for our party of 4, silverware, and go to the bar to get a drink.  We asked 5 different staff members for additional salsa and never received it.  Took us 15 minutes to find someone to provide us with our bill.
Went for lunch date, never been but will definitely be returning!
Santiago had wonderful recommendations!  Burrito Maya was wonderful with pico de mango.  Great place and looking forward to coming back.
First time here. Food was delicious.  Fajitas and sampler platter made a good meal. Will definitely be back
Went here for the first time last night for my birthday. Great service and delicious food. I’ll definitely be back.
Casa Tequila does amazing cocktails! I typically find margaritas and mojitos too sweet and made with soda, but CT has not made a bad drink yet!
Food was average. Service was terrible. Cannot recommend.

We stopped here sunday evening after spending the day up in Holly at the ren fest and I'm so glad we did. The food was spectacular and the service was super quick and friendly. And it wasn't too expensive! If we're ever in brighton again, we'll definitely be coming back here to eat!
The staff here is amazing, friendly, kind and very attentive.   The food is excellent always &  the portions are very large, prices are very reasonable.
Great service Good food
This is our favorite Mexican place in the area.  The food is always great and there are plenty of margarita options.

Do not listen to the bad reviews. This place is absolutely amazing. The service was incredible and the food was even more incredible. Plus great amount of food at great price. I got two meals and a huge margarita. And my two kids and wife got meals as well. And it was only $80. $40 of it was me. Haha.

Absolutely love the location, we sat outside. Couldn’t be more pleased. It was our first time. And we’re gonna make this a regular place to eat. As soon as we walked in the door the host was very kind and was accommodating. Gave us options for our 2 year old to either sit in a booster seat or the high chair to bring both was very kind. The waiter did a fantastic job, and the food was amazing! Again. You’ll love this place.

We actually walked out of a restaurant on the same street before we came here because the vibe was not welcoming. And they made our evening!
Food is good; kitchen is fast...initial contact from ser ers is VERY slow.

On the east side of the restaurant is a quiet, comfortable patio with late afternoon and evening shade.   Just finished a perfect summer evening on the patio enjoying a great dinner.   The guacamole appetizer is fresh and enjoyable.  Salsa and chips are fresh and not salty. Shrimp tacos are a winner.
Very nice

Third time I went to Casa tequila to have dinner at their food happy hour time 3 to 5. First time they Served us a nacho that was $13 but half off for the happy hour which Actually was a $13 nacho because it filled the plate. We had to take the rest of the food home that we Ordered because it was so much, the second time we decided to order the à la cart, which is also part of the happy hour half off meals. It was good tasting food every time but the last time we went, which will be my last time, we order the nachos again during happy hour, which is $13 half $6.50 and the plate was half of the plate. Then we ordered an à la cart happy hour half off burrito that was made totally different than the first time. I ordered it when they argued with me that I was wrong. I knew that this wasn’t a good place to ever come back to.
Someone needs to educate them on what half off means. It will not be me because I will not be back.
Cassa tequila a rip off $22 margaritas is insane.

I had the tacos de carne asada - they were perfect. My husband and I split a large margarita and we both got buzzed off of it - it was strong but SO delicious - fresh ingredients, not corn syrup mix. My kids tacos weren't great, I wonder of they make better authentic style Mexican food than Americanized, unsure. 5 stars!
Great food, service and atmosphere!

Have eaten here twice and enjoyed food and service. Ate there July 3rd, food was good service for was unbelievable subpar. Had to repeatedly ask for drinks, food and bill. Ask twice to speak with a manager. Could not find anyone that understood what we were asking for. ??????
Great food! Great service will be back

Vegan chorizo tacos are excellent!
Black beans and rice also great options for vegans.
Tasty and fresh salsa and chips.
The service is always pleasant and friendly.
The patio is lovely for Alfresco dining.
My go to vegan meal in Brighton!!!
Thanks Casa Tequila!!!
Oh and you usually can count on Mexican music which is a bonus:)

Super disappointed. The food was really good, but the service was absolutely horrible. Watched our waitress stand at the hostess booth and plan her phone while we were waiting for drinks and food. Never checked on us. Will not come back
The food was delicious, the service excellent... everyone who served us was very friendly.
My favorite restaurant in Brighton! The food is consistently delicious, the atmosphere is great, the drinks are strong and the service is always lovely :)
Fernando is the best waiter we have had here. Attentive friendly humorous. Food is great.  Great experience.
Very good place
Awesome food and atmosphere!
Had a great visit. Kevin B was an awesome server - very attentive and friendly.

I had the burrito lunch special. The ground beef filling was moist and flavored by the burrito chili sauce. The portions of rice, refried beans and the burrito were more than expected for a lunch plate. The Mexican rice was delicious as well as cooked perfectly as none of it was sticky or clumped together. The refried beans were also very good and not soupy. You can actually use a fork to eat it or dip the excellent corn chips in it and scoop up a tasty mouthful. The employees work well together, seem happy and gave me prompt and friendly service. The restaurant's interior was very clean, great ambiance and the music soundtrack had modern Mexican music in the background. They do have outdoor seating as well.
Carlos was great! Love the outside patio seating! Great place to enjoy a fruity margarita and a taco.
Katherin is the best!
Katherin was an amazing server!  So very kind & always met us with smiles!  A very sweet server!
The food was so delicious and our server Carlos was most attentive and friendly. It really was a good overall experience. Best Birria I’ve ever had
Katherin was so lovely and service was perfect.
Great atmosphere,food and drinks
Fernando was great! So much fun. He told us he gets all his fun from his momma so this this is a formal think you to Fernando’s mom:) food is great too:)
Great service!

Friendly and fast service but the food was pretty bad. Rice and beans were yummy but the chicken in my meal was inedible. Gritty and hard pieces. It's painful to spend $25 on a meal that you can't enjoy. :(
Food is always amazing and Fernando is a great waiter!

Beware if ordering your food online!  They have always had good food but our pickup order of 2 dinners took over an hour!!!! The text said it would be 30 minutes, totally acceptable! After 35 minutes of waiting for text I called and they took another 20 minutes!
Kathe was amazing, great service and super nice!!!
great Place  Tacos are Amazing.....
Frieda was a great server!
Frida was great and the food was awesome!
Frida was great!!!!

Stopped in during the Brighton Homecoming and surprisingly got a great table outside.  Had a margarita and a bean and cheese appetizer, both were good.  Server was very nice, but very slow, maybe due to the parade crowd.  Overall a pleasant experience, I would like to go back and try more menu items during a normal meal service.
Really starting to enjoy this restaurant!! The staff is always kind, helpful and we enjoy the food.   Last two times we've been here Irving was our server.  Super friendly and funny!!
Irving was great!
Irving was fantastic and made our night so enjoyable.

I got the Especial Nayarit, highly recommend. I had enough food from that one dish for leftovers the next day, so two meals for the cost of one. :)

Food came super fast (we were there a little before the dinner rush though), and Frida, our server did a lovely job. She took care of my table efficiently and effectively and without coming by the table too often so that we could focus on spending time together and catching up. That’s my personal preference for servers, so I appreciated that approach! :)
Playing Israeli propaganda on the tv is weird
First time here.  Unbelievable menu and execution.  Great value to boot. Will be back often.
The service, dinner and the atmosphere was great! We had an awesome evening. Frida was an outstanding server! The food was terrific!
Frida was amazing! Service was great!
Place was great.  Food was warm and tasty.  Service was attentive.  Thank you!
The good was delicious and it came out fast.  Everything tasted great and our server Irving was fantastic.  Very attentive and ready to serve.

Had lunch today with 3 other ladies. We were all impressed with the atmosphere. The presentation of the food was phenomenal, our waitress was super friendly and we all enjoyed our meal. Will definitely be back again.
We LOVE Frida!!! Every time we come we request her. Shes kind, and she remembers our orders!!! We love this place!
Frida was excellent!  She took care of so so courteously and kindly. 😊
Frida is always so kind to us and remembers us! We love her!
Frida is always is so nice and welcoming! She gives the best service! :)
Frida was amazing! Great service and very wonderful. Can't recommend Casa Tequila enough!
Frida was a wonderful server , good and drinks are top notch
Best Mexican food in Brighton - authentic, fresh, flavorful. Everyone I know agrees. Birra pork tacos are amazing. The vegan chorizo tacos taste like the real thing. Highly recommend.
Service from Frida was fantastic! I was not fantastic of our seats but the fajitas were good
Freda is a great server.
Frida was super kind to us! She’s very pretty aswell

Our favorite spot downtown Brighton! Servers are all friendly and efficient, food is always so good and authentic, and the pours are strong! A place we spend every date night and also somewhere we like to bring friends and family who visit! 10/10
Food and service were outstanding. Authentic menu having traveled many times throughout Mexico. We will definitely be back.
Frida is very nice and made are dinner very pleasant
Frieda was amazing!!!! She has a great personality.  And was so fun!! We love her!!!!

Not bad but there are better Mexican restaurants in the area. Friendly service. It was busy and seemed a good place for families. Also nice bar and big screen. Decor is fun and unusual-wooden barrel slatted ceiling and other odd but fun details.
Delicious tacos very authentic nice atmosphere and great service with Kevin
Kevin thanks for helping me celebrate my wife's birthday! SALUTE!!!
Kevin was our server and was so much fun to have. The service was great and the food was awesome.

We had the pleasure of dining at our favorite Mexican restaurant tonight, and Kevin absolutely made the experience unforgettable. From the moment we were seated, his warmth and professionalism stood out. He greeted us with a genuine smile, offered thoughtful recommendations from the menu, and ensured our drinks and dishes arrived promptly and perfectly.

Kevin’s attention to detail was impeccable—he anticipated our needs before we even asked, checked in just the right amount, and made us feel like valued guests without ever being intrusive. His knowledge of the menu and enthusiasm for the food added an extra layer of enjoyment to our meal.

It’s rare to find a server who combines efficiency, charm, and care so seamlessly. Kevin truly elevated our evening, and we’ll be asking for him by name next time we visit. Bravo, Kevin—you’re a gem!

Wonderful food and great service! Was not my first time there but felt bad but at the end of the evening though because it says the place is open until 10, we were done eating before 9, and were just talking and enjoying our drinks, were cashed out by 9:15ish I would say, and was not told the place was closing early, and by 9:45 we got told "We've been closed...", I tried apologizing and said we thought you closed at 10, but we got a cold shoulder. We promptly left, no harm, just felt we could have been warned they were closing early, and or if the hours are wrong, they should be updated for a Thursday evening.

Overall, my experience here was pretty great!

Our server, Javier, was amazing! He was polite, personable, and timely. He was definitely the highlight of our dinner!

I went specifically for the birria tacos. I recently had some elsewhere, and had a hankering. They were delicious! Served with a lime wedge and the dip *chef's kiss* And the portion was certainly healthy!

My guest had a fajita burrito. He was somewhat underwhelmed, with his biggest complaint being that the peppers were too sweet, and a little heavy on the lettuce. The tortilla also wasn't big enough to re-roll after adding toppings. However, overall he enjoyed his dish, as well.

We both liked the chips and salsa.

If you're a ginger beer enthusiast like me, don't waste your money on it here. It's bland, very sweet, with little-to-no bite.

The prices for comparable dishes at nearby restaurants was higher. However, part of what you're paying for is the service (again, wonderful!) and the atmosphere.

The restaurant has a cozy feel. They were playing Spanish versions of oldies at a perfect volume. It was fun!

Finally, is like to add that, when they saw I was with a service dog in training, they didn't bat an eye. This isn't the case everywhere. An extra special shout out for that!

I ordered chicken fajitas & was brought chicken & steak. My plate was taken back to the kitchen & when returned I swear  had more veges & just the 1/2 amount of chicken! They had plug-in air freshers that went off periodically & flared my asthma! I told the waiter about it & he stated the restaurant did not have them; on the way out I pointed 1 out to him. Lastly,  we were presented a bill with only a total! Wont rush back... 🫤

Great service
Lots of good food
Great food AWESOME food

If you came Mexican food, leave. I ordered a dish that said “tortillas filled with beef lettuce and cheese” imagine my surprise when the server came out with a plate of cold rice and beans with one taco that was seasoned with Ortega brand taco seasoning. The salsa was good, but you couldn’t pay me to believe the chips didn’t come from a bag. I got charged $10 for a weak dish lacking in flavor and food, not to mention the server acted like he didn’t what Coke was. I won’t be back.
Best Mexican in Brighton

The food was fine but service was not. Our waiter completely disappeared after taking our order. We were hoping for water refills, or napkins. He did pass our table several times, but did not stop despite our best efforts to get his attention. When it was time to pay our bill, we tried flagging him down for a good long   time. We landed up asking someone else for the bill. She came with the electronic system and seemed to be guessing what we had? Our bill was never shown to me and she just gave me an amount and took my card.  Shame on me for not requesting one, but the price was very steep for what we got. It’s was all very odd.
Everything was great, including the food, cleanliness, and service (Kathe was great!). Highly recommend!
Great food very friendly people!! Can't wait to eat here again
Always a great dinner here, especially when Kathe is our server. Great tacos and quesadillas!
We come in here all of the time and never once had bad service or bad food. Everyone is so wonderful and the food is great! Thank you for an amazing time!

Loved everything about it!!  Great Margaritas 🍹 and steak fajitas.  Great service provided by our server, Leo
Would highly recommend this place and we will definitely be back!! So good!!!
Honestly one of the best chicken quesadillas I've ever had.   Very good monito too.  Yum.
Frida is amazing
Frida 10/10 stars
Irving is the best waiter and the foods the best in town! Great vibes

Excellent authentic Mexican food with great vegan and vegetarian options! Pictured is the tasty beefless vegan tacos with black beans. My friends had fish tacos and really liked those as well. Guacamole and chips were wonderful as well. Service was good. I will definitely be coming back!

Frida was warm welcoming and attentive
She made excellent menu recommendations Food was authentic cuisine
Cocktails were perfect Food was delicious and served hot Great dinner with friends p
Fantastic food & margs! The street corn was incredible. Frida was so kind & attentive. We will be back :)
My tacos and rice were better than hitting all my parlays and I even got yelled at for eating it too fast.
Mediocre food at best not the best Mexican food in town by far
Frida was Awesome! Great service great food!
Awesome tacos, margaritas, and salsa. Waiter was very kind in providing plentiful servings of chips for my whole family when we went out together.

Pretty good. We had vegan fish tacos, burrito verde, chili relleno, and street corn. Skip the street corn, very underwhelming compared to actual esquites, was mostly just corn with some char and mayo. Vegan fish tacos were good- vegan menu section only has 3 items but those are 3 distinct vegan meats, seems like it would be easy to also offer burritos or other items with the vegan meats. My burrito was quite tasty, and the sides were pretty generous (though the beans that came with the vegan tacos were pretty small). Chili relleno was fine, sauce was a little weird, maybe just enchilada sauce?

My husband and I come here all the time! The food is the best mexican food around, we always get great service, and they have delish margs ( always strong too!!). Comparable to some of the better mexican restaurants in the area ( our fav was always las palapas in livonia iykyk).  They deserve way higher reviews, but got screwed by early opening reviews. Give it a try- you wont be disappointed!!
Jovani was an excellent server.

The inside of the building is amazing. The ceiling and walls are crafted for oak barrels. The food was amazing, the waitress was super friendly, the margaritas were good. We will for sure be going back.
Great Food!
Frida was amazing!!
So friendly! Very very accommodating and just absolutely delicious. My fiancée and I are vegan and this has become our new favorite spot. Feels so good supporting a business ran by good people
Frida is an amazing waitress!
Frida was a great waitress!
she gave excellent service and handled my crazy bother🤣
Casa tequila is a great place to meet friends and family for a great Mexican dinner.

I ordered the tacos and they were perfect.  I tried a margarita and it was the best.
It’s been years since we visited but this is my local go to.
The vegan beefless tacos were delicious! Service was also great. We can’t wait to come back.
Great service and good food.
Excellent service. Excellent. Food, authentic Mexican, love it.
Frida was an excellent waitress👍🏻
Frida was wonderful and the food is amazing.
Very good food. The poppers are epic.
Horrible food and service

Service was good and the flautas were decent. After reading other reviews I feel like I definitely have to come back here and try something else because I feel like other menu items might be more flavorful or more enjoyable.

It took about an hour to get my drink My queso was freezing cold. There was a weird layer on my queso I’m guessing from
Sitting so long before bringing it to the table. My tamales were freezing cold. All of the food took forever. My taco was freezing Cold came with lettuce and I asked without. There was blood all over the women’s toilet seat? My server just said oh sorry and never did a single thing about it. all in all never going there again.

nice place , service was a little slow with no offers to refill drinks.  never got my extra napkins and our table was sticky .. ordered a combo of a beef burrito and a taco . ive had better tacos at taco bell .. the burrito had uncooked ground beef in it. the taco shell was straight up ortega quality at best not homemade like other mexican places .. will not repeat
Great food
Frita was amazing and so sweet!! Food was amazing and coconut margarita is to die for

Music was good if you like Lady Gaga not mariachi lol Service we had to go get someone. Food… disappointed with a 4.5 rating expected better. Beef was greasy, margarita didn’t even taste like a regular margarita. The best this was the beans and rice. Being from Texas expected better.

This place is a hidden jewel. This is not your ordinary mexican cuisine. The food was excellent and this place has the coolest bar I've ever seen. The ceiling is covered in strips of.old whiskey barrels. Awesome place and great food
Loved the fish tacos

Food is now alright. Drinks are hit or miss as they refuse to hire a bar tender. Servers make drinks and never know what you will get. We ordered top shelf drinks and they were not consistent at all ..first round was good. Second round during dinner was awful. Asked server and all he could say was same as first round.
First time here.

This was our second go around with Casa Tequila. First attempt was during the holidays and second was a week or two ago. overall Service and atmosphere were good and my littles ones especially liked when the train came by. It is a nice place in downtown Brighton for a meal. However, the food itself left something to be desired both times. Tried different items each time, first was the ala carte combo so I could sample a little of everything and this past time was the fajita burrito. Overall food tasted ok, but wasn't anything to write home about, plus the food was very messily put on the plate, which especially with the cheese sauce on the burrito, turned the plate into a soupy affair. Again, food was ok, but it did leave something to be desired. If i were to be looking for a spot to grab maybe some margaritas or a drink on the patio with some chips and salsa, this would be a go to, but again, the overall food itself would not make come back.
Food was great and so was the margaritas
Frida was such a wonderful server!!  She took great care of us!  Food is always amazing!
Frida was awesome!
Not sure about the food, we had a party of eight. We were seated outside and forgotten about for a half hour, so we left.
Carlo  was amazing!! Food fantastic! Atmosphere is superb. Ask for Carlo top service!!!
Carlos was great!! Came here for a friend's Birthday and he was very friendly, service was fast!!!
Carlos was great!

Carlos was very attentive and pleasant to work with! He gave us time to look at the menu but was always present to help whenever we needed him. Food was great and the atmosphere was great! Love the music too! The margaritas were great as well! Thank you for a great experience.
We sat at the bar and had the best service! The food is fantastic.
Yummy food, also have a small vegan and vegetarian section!  Frida is such a friendly and helpful server! The vegan tacos are delicious 😋
Amazing food and atmosphere. Staff is very friendly. Frida is an amazing waitress.
The fajita salad was so flavorful. The portion was more than enough for 2 small eaters. The atmosphere was excellent!!

Loved the food, loved the service, and loved the drinks! Went downtown for a place to eat and stumbled in with the wife and 3 boys. I would recommend to anyone looking for a good night at for the family!!
Fernando was awesome. Did a great job stayed on top of us. Make sure we had everything we needed. Made it a great experience.
Beautiful service loved our server
Very very good service and beautiful food and our server was amazing
Kevin was a great server, this was my first time here and will definitely be returning.  Best Mexican food I've had in years.  Top notch margaritas.
So wonderful!!!
Very nice place for a date night, quiet relaxing atmosphere. Katherin's service was also phenomenal!

Kevin was an absolute beast, he was a great server! Very attentive and always checking up on the table to make sure everything was good! If I had to pick a reason to come back that wasn’t the amazing food it would be because of his service! Thank you Kevin!

The inside of the building is so pretty with little details everywhere and the service was great. I got the birria tacos and they were sooo good and great portion size. My husband got the tequila burrito it was ok, the red sauce didn't taste very good so we would not get that again but I would definitely come back for those tacos. 🤤🤤🤤
Had a fantastic meal with excellent service.  Katherine was a delight!
Katherine gave us great service without hovering. She was pleasant and helped out when needed.  Keep up the good work!
Did not care for the steak. Don’t look or taste like steak. Served was very sweet but had to ask for the salsa refill 3Xs. But she was very nice and pleasant.
Kate was amazing! Very personable and helpful. Food and drink was great. 11/10!
I ordered a taco salad with shredded chicken. The amount of chicken was good but otherwise it looked pretty bland. White cheese. One slice of tomato. A glob of sour cream. I won’t order that again.
Santiago was amazing as usual!!
Santiago was amazing!! Friendly! Professional! Made our experience fun!
Brian was the best. We’ll be coming back ♡
Katherin is so sweet and friendly :) from beginning to end, she was very attentive and all smiles! The food was great and the Coco-Rita is amazing 😋

First time here at Casa Tequila, and will absolutely be back. Our waitress, Katherin, was such a delight and so friendly. The drinks were fantastic, nachos delicious and vibes immaculate. Can't wait for visit number 2 💖
Brian was our waiter and did an amazing job and spoke Spanish with my madre
Carlos

We had the pleasure of being served by Brian, and he was absolutely amazing! From the moment we sat down, he made us feel welcomed and taken care of. He was friendly, attentive, and had a great sense of humor that made our experience even more enjoyable. Brian went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect, and his timing and recommendations were spot-on. You can tell he truly cares about his guests. Thank you, Brian, for making our visit so memorable—we’ll definitely be back because of you!

Waited to long for a waitress. Food wasn't great
Will not go there again.

I had great time there. The server was very friendly. He brought a flight of cocktails for our birthday celebration. Food was yummy. I was there twice, and pleasantly impressed by their friendly staff each time. The outside patio is cozy.
Horrible experience. The table was too small for eight people so we sat outside and waited and waited and waited. No one ever served us.
Very good Mexican restaurant...our new favorite!
Good food, great customer service
Best place to go out for date nights. I love taking my daughter here

First time here .they got dining outside inside .
Great atmosphere. Clean.. our server was friendly and tentative.
We got the steak. Pork. Chicken Tacos.
Corn 🌽 tacos tortilla is my opinion bigger than other mexican restaurants .burrito was great but could be filled fuller. Nachos al carbon was fresh loaded tasty.
Quesa birria was loaded hot delicious but prepared a little different .but in all, everything was delicious, hot freash. Give them a try .ignore the negative reviews
The food was delicious Outstanding service

I was really excited to try this restaurant simply because of the outdoor seating! The tables were nice and I do have to add that the color of the chairs and table did not absorb heat so they were not too hot even with direct sun on them! With the light wind our umbrella was spinning around and we had to hold it in place for the entire meal. The host was very nice in trying to help us fix it but we gave up on it in the end. After getting our drink orders, our server came to the table every 25-30 minutes, our drinks sat empty even after he came over to check on us. I did ask him and he was pretty fast about the refill but did not grab refills for the whole table. When my burrito came out it only had the protein inside of it a little sauce and a little pico de mango on the top, it was tasty, but it was $18…for a dry corn tortilla with a few pieces of protein. For the check, the toast system was used, which is normally fine, but the tip percentages were 18%, 25%, 30% which is outrageous. I always tip because I know restaurants don’t pay their servers enough but with the service we received I would not have tipped even 18%, maybe 15%.
Food was ok,  server was good.  Nothing really stood out other than ambiance.
Delicious food, and stiff drinks 😂 …
Very good food but its overpriced. Paid $26.
Loved it
🔥 it's delicious, that's all you need to know lol
